understanding.goal_understanding: Guide the player across the tile grid to reach the goal gem tile '+' within the turn/attempt limits, avoiding fatal hazard tiles (spikes) along the way.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT) or CLICK a specific tile (providing target_position [x, y]) to interact with/removes clickable breakable blocks (like 'x'); after any horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the player in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile (o/m/w), reach the goal, or land on a hazard (u/v spikes) and lose. CLICK does not move the player and is used to open or alter fall paths; UNDO reverts the previous action.
